sourceLabel: Town of Chili Town Court page
notes: Web confirms 585-889-1999 as Chili Town Court main line. 3333 Chili Ave, Rochester NY 14624. M-F 9am-4pm; summer Jun-Aug M-Th 9am-4pm, closed Fri.

sourceLabel: Town of Chili Assessor's Office page
notes: Web confirms 585-889-6132 as Chili Town Assessor's Office line. 3333 Chili Ave. M-F 9am-5pm. STAR/senior/veteran/disability exemptions; March 1 filing deadline.

sourceLabel: First Presbyterian Church of Chili food cupboard page
notes: Web confirms 585-889-9896 as the First Presbyterian Church of Chili main line, host of the Chili Presbyterian Food Cupboard. 3600 Chili Ave 14624. Cupboard runs 3rd Saturday monthly 10am-11:30am.

sourceLabel: Gates Chili School District food pantry page
notes: Web confirms 585-247-5050 as the Gates Chili Central School District main line. Food pantry questions route through district main; pantry is at the Operations Building (3 Spartan Way, enter door #3). 1st & 3rd Wednesdays monthly 3-4pm.
Web confirms (585) 889-2200 as the Chili Public Library line. 3237 Chili Ave, Rochester NY 14624. Inside the Chili Community Center.

sourceLabel: Town of Chili Community Center page
notes: Web confirms 585-889-4680 as the Chili Recreation / Community Center main line. 4400 Buffalo Rd, North Chili NY 14514. Same line serves chilirec (Recreation) and chilisenior (Senior Center) — both housed in the Community Center alongside Chili Public Library.

sourceLabel: Town of Chili Dog Control page
notes: Web confirms 585-889-6175 as the Chili Dog Control line. 3333 Chili Ave. M-F 9am-5pm; summer hours adjust. 911 for after-hours emergencies.
Web confirms (585) 293-3720 as the Village of Churchville main / clerk line. 23 E Buffalo St, Churchville NY 14428. Billing inquiries: ext. 113. Village Clerk: Stacy Stanton.

sourceLabel: Town of Riga Town Clerk page
notes: Web confirms 585-293-3880 as the Town of Riga main switchboard. 6460 Buffalo Rd, Churchville NY 14428. Used by rigaclerk (ext 121/122), rigacourt (ext 127/128), rigaassessor, and rigadogcontrol (ext 125).
Web confirms 585-293-2009 as Newman Riga Library main line. 1 S Main St, Churchville NY 14428. Member of Monroe County Library System.
